heading: Solicitation of comments; notice of public hearings
label: 136s Solicitation of comments; notice of public hearings

children.heading: Secretary of Agriculture
children.label: a Secretary of Agriculture
children.text: The Administrator, before publishing regulations under this subchapter, shall solicit the views of the Secretary of Agriculture in accordance with the procedure described in .section 136w(a) of this title

children.heading: Secretary of Health and Human Services
children.label: b Secretary of Health and Human Services
children.text: The Administrator, before publishing regulations under this subchapter for any public health pesticide, shall solicit the views of the Secretary of Health and Human Services in the same manner as the views of the Secretary of Agriculture are solicited under .section 136w(a)(2) of this title

children.heading: Views
children.label: c Views
children.text: In addition to any other authority relating to public hearings and solicitation of views, in connection with the suspension or cancellation of a pesticide registration or any other actions authorized under this subchapter, the Administrator may, at the Administrator’s discretion, solicit the views of all interested persons, either orally or in writing, and seek such advice from scientists, farmers, farm organizations, and other qualified persons as the Administrator deems proper.

children.heading: Notice
children.label: d Notice
children.text: In connection with all public hearings under this subchapter the Administrator shall publish timely notice of such hearings in the Federal Register.
